use clap::Parser;

#[derive(Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long, default_value = "8080")]
    port: String,

    #[arg(long, default_value = "1024")]
    buffer_size: String,
}

fn run(cli: Cli) {
    let port: u16 = cli.port.parse().expect("invalid port");
    let buffer_size: usize = cli.buffer_size.parse().expect("invalid buffer size");
    println!("port={port} buffer={buffer_size}");
}
